product.name: 180GSM 6ft x 50ft Fence Privacy Screen Heavy Duty Fence Cover Garden Wall Backyard Black
features: 【Perfect Fence to Protect Privacy】With this privacy screen fence, you could have fun with your families not worrying about losing privacy. Also, helping you cut off some noise from your neighbours to give you a peaceful environment. Your dog will not bark from outdoor things and people too.

【Premium Material and More Gram Weight】Made from 100% 180GSM HDPE, comparing to others’150GSM privacy fence, our fence provides more privacy and heavy duty. We use 3 copper buckles in the corner, which helps the fence privacy screen not easy to tear and lasts for years of use.
【Breathable and Good UV Protection】It can block 95% harmful UV, friendly to your skin. This fence is breathable and slightly transparent, allowing sunlight and air to pass through it.
【Easy to install】We provide cable ties for you to install the fence. It can be easily installed by two adults. Each side has two copper buckles to help the fence not shake in the wind.
【Perfect After Sale Service】For any issue please let us know, we provide 12 months warranty and will do our best to give you a happy shopping experience!
